</summary>


```python
import requests
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup
import re

headers = {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}

# 抓取更多详细最佳实践
urls_to_fetch = [
    "https://heolab.dev/blog/api-key-security-best-practices-for-developers",
    "https://www.reform.app/blog/best-practices-storing-api-keys-securely",
]

content_data = {}

for url in urls_to_fetch:
    try:
        resp = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=15)
        soup = BeautifulSoup(resp.text, 'html.parser')
        # 获取标题和正文
        title = soup.find('h1')
        title = title.get_text(strip=True) if title else "Unknown"
        
        # 获取所有段落
        paragraphs = []
        for p in soup.find_all(['p', 'h2', 'h3', 'li']):
            text = p.get_text(strip=True)
            if len(text) > 20:
                paragraphs.append(text)
        
        content_data[title] = paragraphs[:30]  # 取前30条
        print(f"=== {title} ===")
        for i, p in enumerate(paragraphs[:10]):
            print(f"{i+1}. {p[:150]}...")
        print("\n")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error: {url} - {e}")

print("\n=== Summary: Collected from", len(content_data), "sources ===")
